steps.title: Recognize what 'contrast' requires
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two samples—meaning highlight what's different between them, not just mention them both. The notes provide specific differences: thickness (0.7 mm vs. 2 mm) and temperature increase (21.3°C vs. 12°C).

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly contrasts the samples by stating that EPDM is thicker than NiTi. The other three either mention both samples without distinguishing them (A and D) or skip both entirely (C). That matches choice B — B is correct.
